title: Customizing order of custom groups in a board across multiple views

posts.author: Andoni00 (Andoni)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Currently custom groups appear the same across different views of the same board. A current workaround is to group by a specific column value and sort that way (although customization is still limited and it doesn’t apply to the default custom groups).

What are you trying to achieve

It would be great if we could customize the order of default/custom groups across multiple views of the same board.
